mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name FROM article_category ac INNER JOIN category c ON ac.category_id = c.id WHERE ac.article_id = #{id}
SELECT t.id, t.name FROM article_tag atag INNER JOIN tag t ON atag.tag_id = t.id WHERE atag.article_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, summary, url, cover_image, author_id, author_name, author_avatar, view_count, like_count, star_count, share_count, comment_count, type, content, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{url}, #{coverImage}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{authorAvatar}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{starCount}, #{shareCount}, #{commentCount}, #{type}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, summary, url, cover_image, author_id, author_name, author_avatar, view_count, like_count, star_count, share_count, comment_count, type, content, create_time, update_time FROM article WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, author_id FROM article WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT id, title, summary, url, cover_image, author_id, author_name, author_avatar, view_count, like_count, star_count, share_count, comment_count, type, content, create_time, update_time FROM article ORDER BY view_count DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT id, title, summary, url, cover_image, author_id, author_name, author_avatar, view_count, like_count, star_count, share_count, comment_count, type, content, create_time, update_time FROM article ORDER BY like_count DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT id, title, summary, url, cover_image, author_id, author_name, author_avatar, view_count, like_count, star_count, share_count, comment_count, type, content, create_time, update_time FROM article ORDER BY star_count DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT id, title, summary, url, cover_image, author_id, author_name, author_avatar, view_count, like_count, star_count, share_count, comment_count, type, content, create_time, update_time FROM article ORDER BY share_count DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 3
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM article WHERE id IN
#{id}
